title: carex atrofusca subsp. minor
intro: Carex atrofusca subsp. minor, also known as the purple sedge, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Carex atrofusca subsp. minor include its potential to soothe respiratory problems, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Carex atrofusca subsp. minor can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat colds, bronchitis, and other respiratory conditions.
